items.title: Tuchel angry at 'lucky' and 'sloppy' England – can 'mentality' be enough?
items.summary: England head coach Thomas Tuchel is praised by former England players for saying his players "got lucky" in World Cup quarter-final win over Norway – but match-winner Jude Bellingham disagrees.

items.title: How many red cards have there been at the World Cup 2026, and what is the tournament record?
items.summary: THIS year's World Cup has seen a lot of players sent off - with the record of 28 in 2006 under threat! THREE red cards were given between South Africa and Mexico in the World Cup opener - and it is not the only game with multiple red cards. The players' discipline in the opener...

items.title: Alvarez scores extra-time stunner as Argentina set up blockbuster semi vs England
items.summary: Julian Alvarez scored an extra-time stunner as Argentina beat 10-man Switzerland 3-1 and set up a mouth-watering World Cup semi-final clash with England.

items.title: Embolo sent off as result of mistaken identity rule
items.summary: Switzerland's Breel Embolo becomes first player to be sent off as a result of a new law for mistaken identity at the World Cup.

items.title: Top four ranked teams make semi-finals for first time
items.summary: For the first time since there have been Fifa rankings the top four ranked teams have made the semi-final of the World Cup.

items.title: England into semi-finals - what is their path to the final?

items.summary: GARY LINEKER made a shock return to BBC Sport in the aftermath of England's World Cup quarter-final win over Norway. items.title: World Cup 2026: How many games do players miss for a red card and how many have there been?
